name: airtable-mcp-server
description: Multi-base Airtable MCP server with dynamic base/table routing and strict schema validation.
author: tammeshin-web3

commands.name: list
commands.description: List all records from a specific table in a specific base.

table.description: Table name within the selected base.

commands.name: get
commands.description: Retrieve a single record by ID.

commands.name: create
commands.description: Create a new record in a table.

commands.name: update
commands.description: Update an existing record by ID.

commands.name: search
commands.description: Search records by field and value.

commands.name: view
commands.description: List records from a specific Airtable view.

commands.name: schema
commands.description: Retrieve schema for one base or all bases.

base.description: Optional base key. If omitted, returns schemas for all bases.

AIRTABLE_API_KEY.description: Airtable personal access token with access to all required bases.
